templates.title: CI Triage Loop
templates.summary: Classify failing CI runs, group repeated signatures, draft bounded fixes for deterministic failures, and escalate infra or unclear failures.
templates.job: Inspect failed CI signal, classify the root cause, draft a safe fix when the failure is deterministic, and update the tracker with evidence.
templates.exit_gate: The loop stops when failing CI has a classification, verifier evidence, and either a draft fix or a human escalation.
templates.semantic_intent_check: The proposed fix must address the failing signal without weakening tests, disabling checks, or changing unrelated behavior.

required_skills.name: systematic-debugging
required_skills.purpose: Classify deterministic failures and avoid speculative fixes.

required_skills.name: ci-cd-pipeline
required_skills.purpose: Understand CI provider conventions and safe escalation boundaries.

tools.name: github-ci
tools.description: Read CI checks and post PR status comments.

tools.name: adlc-sync
tools.description: Append CI triage status and evidence to the stable work item.

feedback_channels.after_action: after CI classification or fix attempt

escalate_when: fix requires CI config or secrets
same test fails with multiple unrelated signatures

safe_bail_state.state: CI failure classified with evidence and no merge/deploy mutation performed.
safe_bail_state.rollback: Revert only the draft branch or abandon the queue claim.
safe_bail_state.idempotency: Stable failure signature and work-item external id prevent duplicate tickets.

progress_signal.no_progress_rule: Escalate after one fix attempt that does not change the failing signature.

templates.redaction_posture: Do not copy secrets, CI tokens, or full environment dumps into tracker updates.

evidence_refs: operator supplies token budget before unattended CI triage

gates.command: human reviews diff before merge, CI config edits, or test changes

queue_seed_tasks.title: Classify current CI failures and draft safe fixes

expected_paths.reason: CI evidence source only; edits require human approval
Verifier evidence and possible failing-test reproduction

runbook: Install the template, replace placeholder verifier commands, and bind the CI provider connector.
Run queue-claim and worktree-prepare before a fix attempt.
Run the CI-equivalent verifier and sync the tracker with classification and evidence.
Stop at human review before merge or CI configuration changes.
no_overclaim: Does not prove production correctness beyond the configured verifier.

templates.title: PR Babysitter Loop
templates.summary: Watch labeled pull requests, rebase or repair one deterministic failure, update the PR, and stop when CI is green or a human is needed.
templates.job: Monitor PRs labeled for agent watch and perform only bounded maintenance actions with clear evidence.
templates.exit_gate: The PR is green, updated with a blocker, or escalated after the attempt budget is exhausted.
templates.semantic_intent_check: Maintenance changes must preserve the PR author intent and must not expand feature scope.

required_skills.name: systematic-debugging
required_skills.purpose: Limit repair attempts to deterministic causes.

tools.name: github-pr
tools.description: Read PR metadata, rebase, and post status updates.

feedback_channels.after_action: after rebase or one repair attempt

escalate_when: more than ten files would change

safe_bail_state.state: PR is left with a clear status comment and no unreviewed merge.
safe_bail_state.rollback: Reset or abandon the watcher worktree branch only.
safe_bail_state.idempotency: Stable PR number and queue task id prevent duplicate watcher runs.

signals: CI moves from red to green
progress_signal.no_progress_rule: Escalate after one repair attempt or unresolved merge conflict.

templates.redaction_posture: Do not include private review discussion beyond actionable status and evidence links.

evidence_refs: operator supplies PR watcher token budget

gates.command: human reviews changed files before merge or requested-change resolution

queue_seed_tasks.title: Watch labeled PR and perform one safe maintenance attempt

expected_paths.reason: Actual ownership must be narrowed to the PR changed files before claim

runbook: Bind the PR label source and narrow expected_paths to the PR file set before claiming.
Perform at most one rebase or deterministic fix attempt.
Update the PR or linked work item with evidence and stop at human review.
no_overclaim: Does not auto-merge or approve its own PR.

templates.title: Dependency Bump Loop
templates.summary: Detect dependency updates, create a bounded bump branch, run compatibility gates, and open or update a review item.
templates.job: Propose dependency updates only when compatibility checks and audit gates pass.
templates.exit_gate: A bump candidate has verifier evidence and either a draft PR or a human escalation with risk notes.
templates.semantic_intent_check: The update must preserve compatibility and must not hide security or breaking-change risk.

required_skills.name: reuse-analysis
required_skills.purpose: Identify package ownership and compatibility blast radius.

tools.name: package-manager
tools.description: Read and update lockfiles in a bounded worktree.

tools.name: adlc-verifier
tools.description: Run compatibility and security verifier commands.

feedback_channels.after_action: after dependency update or compatibility check

escalate_when: lockfile churn touches unrelated package families

safe_bail_state.state: Dependency candidate is captured with audit and compatibility evidence.
safe_bail_state.idempotency: Package name, source version, target version, and ecosystem form the stable task key.

progress_signal.no_progress_rule: Escalate after one failed compatibility fix attempt.

templates.redaction_posture: Do not include private registry tokens or package manager auth config in logs.

evidence_refs: operator supplies dependency loop token budget

gates.command: human reviews dependency risk, release notes, and lockfile diff before merge

queue_seed_tasks.title: Evaluate and verify dependency update candidate

expected_paths.reason: Example dependency manifest; replace with project manifest
Example lockfile; replace with project lockfile

runbook: Replace manifest and lockfile paths with the project ecosystem.
Run the compatibility verifier and dependency audit before opening a PR.
Escalate major bumps and inconclusive advisories.
no_overclaim: Does not certify all transitive runtime behavior.
Does not bypass human review for dependency risk.

templates.title: Ticket Hygiene Loop
templates.summary: Audit tracker items, append current run evidence, deduplicate stable IDs, and escalate stale or ambiguous tickets.
templates.job: Keep tracker state synchronized with ADLC run evidence without creating duplicate work.
templates.exit_gate: Each candidate ticket has a stable ID, current status, evidence refs, next action, or a dedupe/escalation result.
templates.semantic_intent_check: Tracker updates must reflect evidence from ADLC state and must not invent completed work.

required_skills.name: linear-ticket-creation
required_skills.purpose: Map normalized ADLC work-item sync payloads into tracker state.

required_skills.name: definition-of-done
required_skills.purpose: Keep status updates tied to evidence and next actions.

tools.name: tracker
tools.description: Read existing tracker items and append ADLC status updates.

tools.name: adlc-state
tools.description: Read ADLC workflow state and queue status.

escalate_when: multiple tracker items match the same stable id

safe_bail_state.state: Tracker updates are planned or appended with evidence and no duplicate ticket creation.
safe_bail_state.rollback: Append a corrective tracker comment if a status update is wrong.
safe_bail_state.idempotency: Use work-item external id and sync idempotency key for every mutation.

progress_signal.no_progress_rule: Escalate if a stable id cannot be resolved after one audit pass.

templates.redaction_posture: Tracker updates must omit secrets, private logs, and unredacted customer data.

evidence_refs: operator supplies ticket hygiene token budget

gates.command: human reviews duplicate resolution and irreversible ticket closure

queue_seed_tasks.title: Audit tracker state against ADLC run evidence

runbook: Load workflow state and existing tracker audit before planning mutations.
Use stable IDs to match existing work items before creating anything new.
Append evidence and next action; escalate ambiguous duplicates.
no_overclaim: Does not close tickets without human approval.
Does not create duplicate tickets when stable IDs match.

templates.title: Architecture Debt Discovery Loop
templates.summary: Inspect graph and repo signals for architecture drift, create evidence-backed findings, and stop before design decisions.
templates.job: Find architecture debt candidates with graph evidence and convert verified findings into reviewable work.
templates.exit_gate: Each candidate has graph or repo evidence, affected paths, verifier gaps, and a human review action.
templates.semantic_intent_check: The loop may discover and package debt, but must not approve architecture changes or rewrite boundaries.

required_skills.name: graph-research
required_skills.purpose: Ground architecture findings in Graphify and codebase relationships.

required_skills.name: architecture-pattern
required_skills.purpose: Frame architecture boundaries and decision records.

tools.name: graphify
tools.description: Read the project graph and explain affected relationships.

tools.name: adlc-memory
tools.description: Write architecture memory only after explicit approval.

escalate_when: affected boundary is owned by another team

safe_bail_state.state: Architecture finding is documented with evidence and no architecture mutation performed.
safe_bail_state.rollback: Remove the candidate finding or tracker update if evidence is invalid.
safe_bail_state.idempotency: Finding stable id is derived from affected boundary and graph evidence.

progress_signal.no_progress_rule: Stop after one scan with no new evidence.

templates.redaction_posture: Do not include proprietary diagrams or private incident details unless they are already approved repo evidence.

evidence_refs: operator supplies architecture scan token budget

gates.command: human reviews every architecture finding before implementation

queue_seed_tasks.title: Discover architecture debt candidates with graph evidence

runbook: Refresh Graphify before scanning architecture relationships.
Run memory-health and package findings as review items.
Stop before architecture implementation or approval.

templates.title: Feedback Sweep Loop
templates.summary: Collect human feedback, cluster repeated complaints, and feed scored candidates into learning or champion-holdout gates.
templates.job: Convert repeated human feedback into ranked, evidence-backed improvement candidates.
templates.exit_gate: Feedback clusters are ranked, deduped, tied to workflows, and either queued for improvement or escalated.
templates.semantic_intent_check: Feedback synthesis must preserve user wording and must not fabricate frequency or severity.

required_skills.name: feedback-loop
required_skills.purpose: Promote repeated human edits into learning candidates.

required_skills.name: learning-capture
required_skills.purpose: Capture verified reusable lessons without overclaim.

tools.name: feedback-source
tools.description: Read approved feedback channels and produce normalized feedback clusters.

tools.name: adlc-sync
tools.description: Queue or update follow-up work from feedback clusters.

safe_bail_state.state: Feedback is clustered and ranked with source refs, with no prompt or skill promotion yet.
safe_bail_state.rollback: Discard the proposed cluster or queue update.
safe_bail_state.idempotency: Cluster id is derived from workflow, normalized complaint, and source refs.

progress_signal.no_progress_rule: Stop after one sweep with no clusters above threshold.

templates.redaction_posture: Feedback clusters must redact private user data and secrets before tracker or learning writes.

evidence_refs: operator supplies feedback sweep token budget

gates.command: human reviews feedback clusters before prompt, skill, or product changes

queue_seed_tasks.title: Cluster feedback and queue verified improvement candidates

runbook: Read only approved feedback channels and preserve source refs.
Cluster repeated feedback by workflow and rank by frequency and severity.
Queue improvement candidates; use champion-holdout before prompt or skill promotion.
no_overclaim: Does not promote prompt or skill changes without holdout proof.

templates.title: Skill Champion Loop
templates.summary: Evaluate prompt or skill challengers against a champion, working set, holdout set, and must-pass rules before promotion.
templates.job: Improve skills or prompts only when a challenger beats the champion on holdout data without breaking must-pass rules.
templates.exit_gate: The challenger is promoted by champion-holdout or rejected with evidence and the champion remains unchanged.
templates.semantic_intent_check: Promotion must be based on holdout evidence, not working-set-only improvement or subjective preference.

required_skills.name: feedback-loop
required_skills.purpose: Provide feedback-derived candidates for challenger evaluation.

tools.name: adlc-champion
tools.description: Run champion-holdout evaluation from scored examples.

tools.name: skill-writer
tools.description: Write a skill or prompt challenger only after approval.

escalate_when: two rounds produce no holdout improvement

safe_bail_state.state: Champion remains unchanged unless holdout promotion passes.
safe_bail_state.rollback: Keep current champion and discard challenger patch.
safe_bail_state.idempotency: Evaluation id plus challenger id identifies each attempt.

progress_signal.no_progress_rule: Stop after two rounds without holdout improvement.

templates.redaction_posture: Evaluation examples must be redacted before they enter prompt or skill artifacts.

evidence_refs: operator supplies skill champion token budget

gates.command: human reviews promoted skill or prompt diff before merge

queue_seed_tasks.title: Evaluate challenger against champion and holdout set

runbook: Freeze champion and holdout set before editing.
Change one thing in the challenger.
Promote only if champion-holdout passes; otherwise keep the champion and record the reason.
no_overclaim: Does not promote on working-set-only improvement.
Does not prove future prompts remain correct without refresh.
